top_signals.title: The AI boom is colliding with a new threat: severe weather
top_signals.summary: Heatwaves and severe weather are raising risks for AI data centers, from grid strain to higher insurance and repair costs.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
